title: JackChen-me/open-multi-agent
summary: TypeScript multi-agent orchestration engine — one runTeam() call from goal to result. Multi-model teams, auto task decomposition, parallel execution. 3 runtime dependencies.

title: Iito/spindll
summary: Drop-in Ollama alternative in Rust. Pull models, serve streaming inference over gRPC, multi-model with LRU eviction. Single binary, Metal/CUDA.

title: AronMav/hydeclaw
summary: Self-hosted AI gateway for personal agents. Rust core + TypeScript channels + Python media hub. 28 LLM providers, 6 chat channels, multi-agent orchestration, long-term memory, encrypted secrets vault.

title: Arezkiiiii/mini_llm
summary: 🚀 Build and understand a Large Language Model from scratch using PyTorch through hands-on notebooks focused on core Transformer concepts.

title: MooNyeu/granitepi-4-nano
summary: 🔒 Run a large language model locally on your Raspberry Pi 5 with IBM Granite 4.0 for private, cloud-free AI inference.

title: ronniwheellike973/Mini-Agent
summary: 🧠 Build intelligent agents with Mini Agent, a streamlined demo project leveraging MiniMax M2 for advanced reasoning and robust contextual management.

title: arpan10000/simple-rag-pipeline-demo
summary: 🌌 Build a simple RAG pipeline to generate AI-driven answers using Chroma DB for storage and Grok LLM for context-aware response generation.

title: Almaskhan123/WeKnora
summary: 🔗 Connect and enhance your communication with WeKnora, a powerful platform for seamless integration and interaction in WeChat services.

title: thefilesareinthecomputer/llm-wiki-agent
summary: LLM Wiki AI agent with optional local inference, knowledge graph, and wiki-style KB tools. Runs in Docker. Can run fully offline with Ollama.

title: infiniflow/ragflow
summary: RAGFlow is a leading open-source Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) engine that fuses cutting-edge RAG with Agent capabilities to create a superior context layer for LLMs

title: asqwqwqwqwqwqw/ai-in-the-terminal
summary: 🚀 Master AI tools in the terminal, streamline workflows, and enhance productivity beyond browser limitations with this complete guide.

title: Oceanicabysslesothomonetaryunit652/llm-file-manager-agent
summary: 📁 Manage your files effortlessly using natural language with this LLM-powered assistant, combining intelligence and intuitive design for seamless navigation.

title: pepito-911/research
summary: 🔍 Explore AI-generated research projects, showcasing code and insights created entirely by LLM tools like Claude Code.

title: gabrielvuksani/wotann
summary: WOTANN — The All-Father of AI agent harnesses. One install. Every model. Every channel. Full autonomy.

title: akimoto-akira/SiliconLifeCollective
summary: A .NET 9 multi-agent platform where AI agents (Silicon Beings) self-evolve via Roslyn dynamic compilation. Features tick-driven time-sliced scheduling, executor-permission security, and zero-database file storage. Cross-platform, single-file deployable.

title: Chimdiiii/OpenMemory
summary: 🧠 Enhance AI with OpenMemory for long-term memory storage, recall, and explanation, using a unique cognitive architecture.

title: hesamaria/rag-chatbot
summary: 🧠 Build a RAG-driven chatbot to answer user questions using real-world knowledge from documents, focused on mental health and social policy in Indonesia.
